Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(************************************************************************

 Grothendieck construction: pseudofunctors to fibrations

 The Grothendieck construction gives a biequivalence between the
 bicategory of fibrations over a fixed category `C` and the bicategory
 of indexed categories over `C`. To construct this biequivalence, we
 need to construct the following:
 1. A pseudofunctor from the bicategory of fibrations to the bicategory
    of pseudofunctors
 2. A pseudofunctor from the bicategory of pseudofunctors to the
    bicategory of fibrations
 3. The unit and a proof that it is a pointwise adjoint equivalence
 4. The counit and a proof that it is a pointwise adjoint equivalence

 In this file, we construct the second part of this biequivalence (a
 pseudofunctor from pseudofunctors to fibrations). In this construction,
 we make use of indexed categories in the same way as in
 `FibrationToPseudoFunctor.v`. As such, the fundamental constructions
 can be stated purely in the language of category theory and without
 referring to bicategories. Most of the work in this file lies in
 proving all of the necessary coherences.

 Contents
 1. The action on pseudofunctors
 2. The action on pseudotransformations
 3. The action on modifications
 4. The identitor
 5. The compositor
 6. The data
 7. The laws
 8. The pseudofunctor from pseudofunctors to fibrations

 ************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.

Notation "_ ^op" was already used in scope cat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.OppositeCategory.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fibrations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Fiber.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.FibrationToIndexedCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.CartesianToIndexedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.NatTransToIndexed.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedCategoryToFibration.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedFunctorToCartesian.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.IndexedCategories.IndexedTransformationToTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Discreteness.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.DiscreteBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.FibSlice.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.PseudoFunctorsIntoCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.PseudoTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Transformations.Examples.PseudoTransformationIntoCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Modification.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Modifications.Examples.ModificationIntoCat.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section GrothendieckConstruction.
  Context (C : univalent_category).

  (**
   1. The action on pseudofunctors
   *)
  Definition psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob
             (F : psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats)
    : fib_slice_bicat C
    := let Φ := psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F in
       (indexed_cat_to_disp_cat Φ
       ,, is_univalent_disp_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat Φ)
       ,, indexed_cat_to_cleaving Φ.

  (**
   2. The action on pseudotransformations
   *)
  Definition psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor
             {F G : psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats}
             (n : pstrans F G)
    : psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F
      -->
      psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob G
    := let τ := pstrans_to_indexed_functor n in
       indexed_functor_to_cartesian_disp_functor τ.

  (**
   3. The action on modifications
   *)
  Definition psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_cell
             {F G : psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats}
             {n₁ n₂ : pstrans F G}
             (w : modification n₁ n₂)
    : psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor n₁
      ==>
      psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor n₂
    := let m := modification_to_indexed_nat_trans w in
       indexed_nat_trans_to_disp_nat_trans m.

  Arguments psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_cell {_ _ _ _} _ /.

  (**
   4. The identitor
   *)
  Definition psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_data
             (F : psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats)
    : disp_nat_trans_data
        (nat_trans_id _)
        (disp_functor_identity _)
        (pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor (id_pstrans F)))
    := λ x xx, pr11 (psfunctor_id F x) xx.

  Arguments psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_data _ /.

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_data F)

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_data F)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
ff · # (# F f) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F y)) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f) yy =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (ff
        · (id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy)
           · id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_linvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
((linvunitor (# F f) • (psfunctor_id F y ▹ # F f))
 • psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f) yy
ff · # (# F f) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F y)) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f) yy =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (ff
        · (id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy)
           · id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_linvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· # (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
ff · # (# F f) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F y)) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f) yy =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (ff
        · (id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy)
           · id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy)

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C

p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =

· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
ff
· (# (# F f) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F y)) yy)

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
?b =
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx
   · # (# F (id₁ x))
       (ff
        · (id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy)
           · id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy)

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
# (# F f) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F y)) yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f) yy = ?t2

      exact (!p).

· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy

· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
?b = ff · ## F (linvunitor f) yy

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
?b = ?t2

yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
ff
· (id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy) · id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy)) =
?b

          
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x

p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy) · id₁ ((pr211 F) y x f yy) =
?t20

          apply id_right.

F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx · # (# F (id₁ x)) ff =
?y'

      exact (!(nat_trans_ax (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x)) _ _ ff)).
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (# (id₁ (F x)) ff
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x)
       ((psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ f) yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy) =
ff · ## F (linvunitor f) yy

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats

yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (# F f yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy) =
ff · ## F (linvunitor f) yy

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
((rinvunitor (# F f) • (# F f ◃ psfunctor_id F x))
 • psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (# F f yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy) =
ff · ## F (linvunitor f) yy

q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
transportb (mor_disp xx yy)
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  (ff · pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (# F f yy)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy) =
ff · ## F (linvunitor f) yy

· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =

· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x)) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy

yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy

· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (# F f yy) =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)

      exact (!(id_left _)).

transportb (mor_disp xx yy)

C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
ff · ## F (rinvunitor f) yy
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) = ff · ## F (linvunitor f) yy

· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
ff
· (## F (rinvunitor f) yy
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
          (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)
               x y f))) = ff · ## F (linvunitor f) yy

· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy

  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
## F (rinvunitor f) yy
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
## F (rinvunitor f) yy = ?y'

      apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
     (rinvunitor f))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) = ## F (linvunitor f) yy

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
     (rinvunitor f))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
     (linvunitor f))

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F h) yy) (rinvunitor f) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
        (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f))) =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
     (linvunitor f))

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
  (rinvunitor f) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F $ h) yy)
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
  (linvunitor f)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
  (rinvunitor f @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧, pr1 (# F h) yy)
  (linvunitor f)

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) x
yy: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
p: ## F (linvunitor f) yy =
# (pr1 (# F f)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F y) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F (id₁ y) f yy
q:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (psfunctor_rinvunitor F f)
  yy: ## F (rinvunitor f) yy =
id₁ (# F f yy)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) (pr1 (# F f) yy)
· psfunctor_comp F f (id₁ x) yy
rinvunitor f @
! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f =
linvunitor f

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F)))
  (pr1
     (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor
        (id_pstrans F)))

  
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F)))
  (pr1
     (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor
        (id_pstrans F)))

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F)))
  (pr1
     (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor
        (id_pstrans F)))
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_identity
            (pr1
               (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F)))
         (pr1
            (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor
               (id_pstrans F))),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_identity
     (pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F)))
  (pr1
     (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor
        (id_pstrans F)))
 exact (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_data F).
    
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_identity
            (pr1
               (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob F)))
         (pr1
            (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor
               (id_pstrans F))),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_data F)
 exact (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id_laws F).
  Defined.

  (**
   5. The compositor
   *)
  Definition psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data
             {F G H : psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats}
             (n₁ : pstrans F G)
             (n₂ : pstrans G H)
    : disp_nat_trans_data
        (nat_trans_id _)
        (disp_functor_over_id_composite
           (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₁))
           (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₂)))
        (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor_data (pstrans_to_indexed_functor (n₁ · n₂)))
    := λ x xx, pr11 (psfunctor_id H x) _.

  Arguments psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data {_ _ _} _ _ _ /.

  
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data n₁ n₂)

  
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
disp_nat_trans_axioms
  (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data n₁ n₂)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
transportb
  (mor_disp (n₂ x (n₁ x xx))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
   · # (# H (id₁ x))
       (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
        · (id₁
             ((pr111 n₂) x
                ((pr111 n₁) x ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
           · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
                (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
              · (id₁
                   ((pr111 n₂) x
                      ((pr211 G) y x f
                         ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
                 · (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
                    · id₁
                        ((pr211 H) y x f
                           ((pr111 n₂) y
                              ((pr111 n₁) y yy))))))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (n₂ x (n₁ x xx))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
   · # (# H (id₁ x))
       (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
        · (id₁
             ((pr111 n₂) x
                ((pr111 n₁) x ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
           · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
                (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
              · (id₁
                   ((pr111 n₂) x
                      ((pr211 G) y x f
                         ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
                 · (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
                    · id₁
                        ((pr211 H) y x f
                           ((pr111 n₂) y
                              ((pr111 n₁) y yy))))))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))) =
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (n₂ x (n₁ x xx))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
   · # (# H (id₁ x))
       (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
        · (id₁
             ((pr111 n₂) x
                ((pr111 n₁) x ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
           · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
                (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
              · (id₁
                   ((pr111 n₂) x
                      ((pr211 G) y x f
                         ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
                 · (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
                    · id₁
                        ((pr211 H) y x f
                           ((pr111 n₂) y
                              ((pr111 n₁) y yy))))))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (n₂ x (n₁ x xx))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
   · # (# H (id₁ x))
       (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
        · (id₁
             ((pr111 n₂) x
                ((pr111 n₁) x ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
           · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
                (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
              · (id₁
                   ((pr111 n₂) x
                      ((pr211 G) y x f
                         ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
                 · (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
                    · id₁
                        ((pr211 H) y x f
                           ((pr111 n₂) y
                              ((pr111 n₁) y yy))))))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# H (id₁ x))
    (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
     · (id₁
          ((pr111 n₂) x
             ((pr111 n₁) x ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
        · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
             (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
           · (id₁
                ((pr111 n₂) x
                   ((pr211 G) y x f ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
              · (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
                 · id₁
                     ((pr211 H) y x f
                        ((pr111 n₂) y
                           ((pr111 n₁) y yy))))))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# H (id₁ x))
    (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
     · (id₁
          ((pr111 n₂) x
             ((pr111 n₁) x ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
        · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
             (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
           · (id₁
                ((pr111 n₂) x
                   ((pr211 G) y x f ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
              · (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
                 · id₁
                     ((pr211 H) y x f
                        ((pr111 n₂) y
                           ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))))))) =
?y'

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
id₁ ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x ((pr211 F) y x f yy)))
· (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
     (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
   · (id₁
        ((pr111 n₂) x
           ((pr211 G) y x f ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
      · (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
         · id₁
             ((pr211 H) y x f
                ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))))) =
?t2

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
  (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
· (id₁
     ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr211 G) y x f ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
   · (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
      · id₁
          ((pr211 H) y x f
             ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))))) = 
?t2

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
id₁ ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr211 G) y x f ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
   · id₁
       ((pr211 H) y x f
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))) = ?t2

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
· id₁
    ((pr211 H) y x f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))) =
?t2

      apply id_right.
    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (n₂ x (n₁ x xx))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
   · # (# H (id₁ x))
       (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
        · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
             (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
           · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
               (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))) =
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (n₂ x (n₁ x xx))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
   · # (# H (id₁ x))
       (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
        · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
             (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
           · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
               (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
transportb
  (mor_disp (n₂ x (n₁ x xx))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
   · # (# H (id₁ x))
       (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
        · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
             (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
           · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
               (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))) = ?b

      apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H)).
    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# H (id₁ x))
    (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
     · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
          (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
        · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
            (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) =
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# H (id₁ x))
    (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
     · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
          (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
        · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
            (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# H (id₁ x))
    (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
     · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
          (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
        · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
            (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# H (id₁ x))
    (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
     · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
          (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
        · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
            (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy))) = ?y'

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?y' =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id H x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# H (id₁ x))
    (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
     · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
          (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
        · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
            (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))

      apply (nat_trans_ax (pr1 (psfunctor_id H x))).
    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (id₁ (H x))
  (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
   · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
        (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
      · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
    (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) =
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
# (id₁ (H x))
  (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
   · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
        (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
      · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
    (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
# (id₁ (H x))
  (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
   · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
        (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
      · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
    (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (n₂ x)
  (# (n₁ x) ff
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy) = ?y'

      apply functor_comp.
    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (n₂ x) (# (n₁ x) ff)
· # (n₂ x) (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
· # (# H f)
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
# (id₁ (H x))
  (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
   · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
        (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
      · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
    (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (n₂ x) (# (n₁ x) ff)
· (# (n₂ x) (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
   · (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
      · (# (# H f)
           ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y))
              (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
         · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
             ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))))) =
# (id₁ (H x))
  (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
   · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
        (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
      · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
    (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (id₁ (H x))
  (# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
   · (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
        (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
      · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
    (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) =
# (n₂ x) (# (n₁ x) ff)
· (# (n₂ x) (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
   · (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
      · (# (# H f)
           ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y))
              (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
         · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
             ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# ((pr111 n₂) x) (# ((pr111 n₁) x) ff)
· (# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
     (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
   · pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
   · (pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
        (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
      · (pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
           ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
         · idtoiso
             (maponpaths
                (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
                   ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
                (! is_nat_trans_id
                     (functor_identity_data C) x y f))))) =
# (n₂ x) (# (n₁ x) ff)
· (# (n₂ x) (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
   · (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
      · (# (# H f)
           ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y))
              (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
         · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
             ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
  (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
· pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
· (pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
     (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
   · (pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
        ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
      · idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
                ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
             (! is_nat_trans_id
                  (functor_identity_data C) x y f)))) =
# (n₂ x) (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
   · (# (# H f)
        ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y))
           (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x))
  (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₁) y x f)) ^-1 yy)
· (pr1 (pr2 ((pr211 n₂) y x f)) ^-1
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) y) yy)
   · (pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
        (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
      · (pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
           ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
         · idtoiso
             (maponpaths
                (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
                 (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
                   ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
                (! is_nat_trans_id
                     (functor_identity_data C) x y f))))) =
# (n₂ x) (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₁ f)) ^-1 yy)
· (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₂ f)) ^-1 (n₁ y yy)
   · (# (# H f)
        ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y))
           (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
  (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· (pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
             ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
          (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)
               x y f))) =
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
  (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· (pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
             ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
          (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)
               x y f))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
  (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· (pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
             ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
          (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C)
               x y f))) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
  (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
  (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) = ?y'

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
  (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
((rinvunitor (# H f) • (# H f ◃ psfunctor_id H x))
 • psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
  ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1 (psfunctor_id H x)
  (# H f ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
rinvunitor (# H f) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· ((# H f ◃ psfunctor_id H x)
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
   · psfunctor_comp H f (id₁ x)
       ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))

      exact (!(id_left _)).
    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
## H (rinvunitor f) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) =
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
## H (rinvunitor f) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
## H (rinvunitor f) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
## H (rinvunitor f) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
?y'

      apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
     (rinvunitor f))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
          ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
       (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
            y f)) =
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (rinvunitor f) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
           ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f))) =
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (rinvunitor f) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
           ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (rinvunitor f) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
           ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) = ?b

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
((linvunitor (# H f) • (psfunctor_id H y ▹ # H f))
 • psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
  ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
# (# H f)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id H y)) (pr1 (n₂ y) (n₁ y yy)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f)
    ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
linvunitor (# H f) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
· ((psfunctor_id H y ▹ # H f)
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy))
   · psfunctor_comp H (id₁ y) f
       ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))

      exact (!(id_left _)).
    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
## H (linvunitor f) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (rinvunitor f) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
           ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
## H (linvunitor f) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (rinvunitor f) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
           ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
## H (linvunitor f) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)) =
?b

      apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
     (linvunitor f)) =
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (rinvunitor f) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
           ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
        (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x
             y f)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (linvunitor f) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (rinvunitor f) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H $ h)
     ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# H h) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (linvunitor f) =
maponpaths
  (λ z : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# H z) ((pr111 n₂) y ((pr111 n₁) y yy)))
  (rinvunitor f @
   ! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f)

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) x
yy: indexed_cat_to_disp_cat
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F) y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
linvunitor f =
rinvunitor f @
! is_nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C) x y f

    apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₁))
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₂)))
  (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor_data
     (pstrans_to_indexed_functor (n₁ · n₂)))

  
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
disp_nat_trans (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₁))
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₂)))
  (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor_data
     (pstrans_to_indexed_functor (n₁ · n₂)))

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₁))
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₂)))
  (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor_data
     (pstrans_to_indexed_functor (n₁ · n₂)))
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
               (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₁))
            (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
               (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₂)))
         (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor_data
            (pstrans_to_indexed_functor (n₁ · n₂))),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b) ?pr1

    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
disp_nat_trans_data
  (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
  (disp_functor_over_id_composite
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₁))
     (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
        (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₂)))
  (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor_data
     (pstrans_to_indexed_functor (n₁ · n₂)))
 exact (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data n₁ n₂).
    
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: pstrans F G
n₂: pstrans G H
(λ b : disp_nat_trans_data
         (nat_trans_id (functor_identity C))
         (disp_functor_over_id_composite
            (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
               (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₁))
            (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor
               (pstrans_to_indexed_functor n₂)))
         (indexed_functor_to_disp_functor_data
            (pstrans_to_indexed_functor (n₁ · n₂))),
 disp_nat_trans_axioms b)
  (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_data n₁ n₂)
 exact (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp_axioms n₁ n₂).
  Defined.

  (**
   6. The data
   *)
  
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_data
  (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
     bicat_of_univ_cats) (fib_slice_bicat C)

  
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_data
  (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
     bicat_of_univ_cats) (fib_slice_bicat C)

    
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
→ fib_slice_bicat C
C: univalent_category
∏
a
 b : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats,
psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ a, b ⟧ → fib_slice_bicat C ⟦ ?F₀ a, ?F₀ b ⟧
C: univalent_category
∏
(a
 b : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f
 g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f ==> g → ?F₁ a b f ==> ?F₁ a b g
C: univalent_category
∏
a : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
      bicat_of_univ_cats,
id₁ (?F₀ a) ==> ?F₁ a a (id₁ a)
C: univalent_category
∏
(a b
 c : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧),
?F₁ a b f · ?F₁ b c g ==> ?F₁ a c (f · g)

    
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
→ fib_slice_bicat C
 exact psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob.
    
C: univalent_category
∏
a
 b : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats,
psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op) bicat_of_univ_cats
⟦ a, b ⟧
→ fib_slice_bicat C
  ⟦ psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob a,
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob b ⟧
 exact (λ F G n, psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor n).
    
C: univalent_category
∏
(a
 b : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f
 g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧),
f ==> g
→ (λ (F
      G : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
            bicat_of_univ_cats)
   (n : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
          bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧),
   psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor n) a b f ==>
  (λ (F
      G : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
            bicat_of_univ_cats)
   (n : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
          bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧),
   psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor n) a b g
 exact (λ F G n₁ n₂ w, psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_cell w).
    
C: univalent_category
∏
a : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
      bicat_of_univ_cats,
id₁ (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_ob a) ==>
(λ (F
    G : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
          bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (n : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
        bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧),
 psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor n) a a (id₁ a)
 exact (λ F, psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_id F).
    
C: univalent_category
∏
(a b
 c : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧),
(λ (F
    G : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
          bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (n : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
        bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧),
 psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor n) a b f
· (λ (F
      G : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
            bicat_of_univ_cats)
   (n : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
          bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧),
   psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor n) b c g ==>
(λ (F
    G : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
          bicat_of_univ_cats)
 (n : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
        bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧),
 psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_mor n) a c (f · g)
 exact (λ F G H n₁ n₂, psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_comp n₁ n₂).
  Defined.

  (**
   7. The laws

C: univalent_category
psfunctor_laws psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data

C: univalent_category

  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_runitor_law
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_lassociator_law
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_lwhisker_law
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_rwhisker_law
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data

    
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_id2_law
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (id₂ n) =
id₂ (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n)

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
∏ (x : C)
(xx : pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x),
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (id₂ n) x xx =

  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (id₂ n) x xx =
id₂ (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n) x xx

      apply id_left.
