  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
 
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (w₁ • w₂) =
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w₁
• PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
    psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w₂

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
∏ (x : C)
(xx : pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x),
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (w₁ • w₂) x xx =
(PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
   psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w₁
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w₂) x xx

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (w₁ • w₂) x xx =
(PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
   psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w₁
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w₂) x xx

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
(pr111 w₁) x xx · (pr111 w₂) x xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n₁ x xx, # G z (n₃ x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w₁ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n₁ x xx, # G z (n₃ x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w₁ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx)) =
(pr111 w₁) x xx · (pr111 w₂) x xx
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n₁ x xx, # G z (n₃ x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w₁ x xx
   · (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
      · (# (# G (id₁ x))
           (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
         · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
             (n₃ x xx)))) =
(pr111 w₁) x xx
· ((pr111 w₂) x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n₁ x xx, # G z (n₃ x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w₁ x xx
   · (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
      · (# (# G (id₁ x))
           (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
         · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
             (n₃ x xx)))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
?b =
(pr111 w₁) x xx
· ((pr111 w₂) x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))

xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n₁ x xx, # G z (n₃ x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w₁ x xx
   · (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
      · (# (# G (id₁ x))
           (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
         · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
             (n₃ x xx)))) = ?b

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
· (# (# G (id₁ x))
     (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx)) =
?t2

w₂: n₂ ==> n₃

xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ x))
    (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx) =
?t2

xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x

C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ x))
    (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx) =
?b

          
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ x))
    (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx)) = 
?y'

          
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
?y' =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₂ x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ x))
    (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))

          apply (nat_trans_ax (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x))).
        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
# (id₁ (G x))
  (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
# (id₁ (G x))
  (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
· (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx)) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx): ## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx) =
((rinvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
  • (# G (id₁ x) ◃ psfunctor_id G x))
 • psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx)
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx): ## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x)
    (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx)
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx): ## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x)
    (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx)
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x)
    (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n₃ x xx)

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx): ## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x)
    (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx)
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x)
    (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx)) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))

        apply id_left.
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n₁ x xx, # G z (n₃ x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w₁ x xx
   · (# (id₁ (G x))
        (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
      · ## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))) =
(pr111 w₁) x xx
· ((pr111 w₂) x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n₁ x xx, # G z (n₃ x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w₁ x xx
   · (# (id₁ (G x))
        (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
      · ## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
?b =
(pr111 w₁) x xx
· ((pr111 w₂) x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n₁ x xx, # G z (n₃ x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w₁ x xx
   · (# (id₁ (G x))
        (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
      · ## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))) = ?b

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)).
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
w₁ x xx
· (# (id₁ (G x))
     (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))
   · ## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h) (n₃ x xx))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
(pr111 w₁) x xx
· ((pr111 w₂) x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category

  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
w₁ x xx
· (w₂ x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx)
   · ## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # G h (n₃ x xx))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
(pr111 w₁) x xx
· ((pr111 w₂) x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
w₁ x xx
· (w₂ x xx
   · (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx)
      · (## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx)
         · idtoiso
             (maponpaths
                (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # G h (n₃ x xx))
                (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                   x))))) =
(pr111 w₁) x xx
· ((pr111 w₂) x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx))

w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx)
· (## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx)
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # G h (n₃ x xx))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx)

pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx)
· (## G (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx)
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # G h (n₃ x xx))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n₃ x xx)
· id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))

C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
     (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # G h (n₃ x xx))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
        (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # G h (n₃ x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
        (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # G h (n₃ x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
pr1 (idtoiso (idpath (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x) xx))
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, # G h (n₃ x xx))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
idpath (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
maponpaths
  (λ z : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# (pr11 G) z) (n₃ x xx))
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
idpath (# G (id₁ x) (n₃ x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂, n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
maponpaths
  (λ z : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# (pr11 G) z) (n₃ x xx))
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
maponpaths
  (λ z : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# (pr11 G) z) (n₃ x xx)) (idpath (id₁ x))

      
C: univalent_category

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
w₁: n₁ ==> n₂
w₂: n₂ ==> n₃
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
rinvunitor (id₁ x) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x =
idpath (id₁ x)

      apply homset_property.
    
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_lunitor_law
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
 
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
lunitor (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n) =
((PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
    psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F
  ▹ # psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n)
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (id₁ F) n)
• PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
    psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (lunitor n)

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
∏ (x : C)
(xx : pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x),
lunitor (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n) x
  xx =
(((PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F
   ▹ # psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n)
  • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (id₁ F) n)
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (lunitor n))
  x xx

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
lunitor (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n) x
  xx =
(((PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F
   ▹ # psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n)
  • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (id₁ F) n)
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (lunitor n))
  x xx

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z ((pr111 n) x xx) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (# (n x) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
      · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx
      · # (# G (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n) x xx))
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       (id₁ ((pr111 n) x xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx))

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z ((pr111 n) x xx) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (# (n x) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
      · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx
      · # (# G (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n) x xx))
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       (id₁ ((pr111 n) x xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z ((pr111 n) x xx) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (# (n x) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
      · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx
      · # (# G (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n) x xx))
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       (id₁ ((pr111 n) x xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
?b = pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z ((pr111 n) x xx) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (# (n x) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
      · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx
      · # (# G (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n) x xx))
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       (id₁ ((pr111 n) x xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
?b

        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z ((pr111 n) x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (n x) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n) x xx))
· # (# G (id₁ x))
    (id₁ ((pr111 n) x xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =
?t2

  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (n x) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))

  bicat_of_univ_cats

· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx
· # (# G (id₁ x))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n) x xx)

    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,

  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt n x) xx: ((psfunctor_id F x ▹ n x)
 • (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x)) ^-1) xx =
((lunitor (n x) • rinvunitor (n x))
 • (n x ◃ psfunctor_id G x)) xx
# (n x) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx = ?y'0

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt n x) xx: # (pr1 (n x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx)
· (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x)) ^-1 xx =
id₁ (n x xx) · id₁ (n x xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 (n x) xx)
# (n x) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F x)) xx)
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x))) ^-1 xx = ?y'0

p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt n x) xx: # (pr1 (n x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx)
· (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x)) ^-1 xx =
id₁ (n x xx) · id₁ (n x xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 (n x) xx)
id₁ (n x xx) · id₁ (n x xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 (n x) xx) = ?y'0

p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt n x) xx: # (pr1 (n x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F x) xx)
· (psnaturality_of n (id₁ x)) ^-1 xx =
id₁ (n x xx) · id₁ (n x xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 (n x) xx)

· # (# G (id₁ x))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))

   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))

  bicat_of_univ_cats

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
((linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))

  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))

  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n) x xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)

p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (pr1 (n x) xx)) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))

        exact (!(id_left _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 (n x) xx)
   · ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
             ((pr111 n) x xx))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
   · # (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 (n x) xx)
   · ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
             ((pr111 n) x xx))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
   · # (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

· idtoiso
    (maponpaths

        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)

       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =

· idtoiso

       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) = ?y'

          apply (psfunctor_idtoiso G).
        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
     (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
          ((pr111 n) x xx))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
?t2

        exact (!(pr1_idtoiso_concat _ _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 (n x) xx)
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
                ((pr111 n) x xx))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x)))
   · # (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =

C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
((linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =
?t20

p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =

p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)

          
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))

          exact (!(id_left _)).
        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
           ((pr111 n) x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))
· ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
?t2

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @

        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
           ((pr111 n) x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))
· ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =

           ((pr111 n) x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
?t20

          apply (psfunctor_idtoiso G).
        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
           ((pr111 n) x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
       (linvunitor (id₁ x))) = ?t2

        exact (!(pr1_idtoiso_concat _ _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 (n x) xx)
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          ((maponpaths
              (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
               pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
              (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
                 ((pr111 n) x xx))
              (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                 x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

          (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @

((maponpaths
    (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
     pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
    (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
  maponpaths
    (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
     (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h) ((pr111 n) x xx))
    (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) @
 maponpaths

   (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @

  (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h) (n x xx))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
idpath (# G (id₁ x) (n x xx))

runitor (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n) =
((# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n
  ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
      psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data G)
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n (id₁ G))
• PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
    psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (runitor n)

∏ (x : C)
(xx : pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x),
runitor (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n) x
  xx =
(((# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n
   ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
       psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data G)
  • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n (id₁ G))
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (runitor n))

runitor (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n) x
  xx =
(((# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n
   ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
       psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data G)
  • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
      psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n (id₁ G))

C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z ((pr111 n) x xx) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
      · # (# G (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n) x xx))
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       (id₁ ((pr111 n) x xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx))

transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z ((pr111 n) x xx) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
      · # (# G (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n) x xx))
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       (id₁ ((pr111 n) x xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
   · # (# G (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?y'

          apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)).

  bicat_of_univ_cats

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
· # (# G (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n) x xx)
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
          ((pr111 n) x xx))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
· # (# G (id₁ x))
    (id₁ ((pr111 n) x xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =
?t2

  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
((linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n) x xx) = ?t2

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n) x xx) = ?t2

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n) x xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))

        exact (!(id_left _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
   · ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
             ((pr111 n) x xx))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
   · # (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
     (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
          ((pr111 n) x xx))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
?t2

        exact (!(pr1_idtoiso_concat _ _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
                ((pr111 n) x xx))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x)))
   · # (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
                ((pr111 n) x xx))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x)))
   · # (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
?b

xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
?b = pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

(pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @

           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
             ((pr111 n) x xx))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))
· # (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths

            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
              ((pr111 n) x xx))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x)))
   · (# (# G (id₁ x))
        (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n x xx))) = ?t2

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

pr1

     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
           ((pr111 n) x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))
· (# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx)) =
?b

          
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =
?t20

          
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
((linvunitor (# G (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id G x ▹ # G (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =
?t20

          
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =
?t20

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)) (n x xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)

  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor G (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx): ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· psfunctor_comp G (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
# (# G (id₁ x)) (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)) =
id₁ (# G (id₁ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· # (pr1 (# G (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))

          exact (!(id_left _)).

pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
           ((pr111 n) x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))
· ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
?t2

        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @

           ((pr111 n) x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

· ## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =

F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
## G (linvunitor (id₁ x)) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx) =
?t20

          apply (psfunctor_idtoiso G).
        
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
           ((pr111 n) x xx))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
       (linvunitor (id₁ x))) = ?t2

        exact (!(pr1_idtoiso_concat _ _)).

x: C

transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          ((maponpaths
              (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
               pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
              (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
            maponpaths

                 ((pr111 n) x xx))
              (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                 x)) @

             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧, G x ⟦ n x xx, # G z (n x xx) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          ((maponpaths
              (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
               pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
              (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
               (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
                 ((pr111 n) x xx))
              (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                 x)) @

             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) = ?b

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G)).
      
C: univalent_category
F, G: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id G x)) (n x xx)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h)
              ((pr111 n) x xx))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# G h) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h) (n x xx))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id G x) (n x xx)

        ((maponpaths
            (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,

           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat G $ h) (n x xx))

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z
        ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      ⟧) (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
        (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
             ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (id₁
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
            ((pr111 n₃) x
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),

        ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      ⟧) (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
        (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
             ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))

          ((pr111 n₃) x

            ((pr111 n₃) x

       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  (id₁ ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) =
?y'

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
id₁ ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?t20

          apply id_left.
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
((linvunitor (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F₄ x ▹ # F₄ (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))

          exact (!(id_left _)).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
?t2

        apply (psfunctor_idtoiso F₄).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z
        ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      ⟧) (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
        (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
             ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z
        ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      ⟧) (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
        (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
             ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z
        ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      ⟧) (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
        (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
             ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?b

F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) =
?y'

          apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄)).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 (# F₄ h)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
       (linvunitor (id₁ x))) = ?t2

idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
        ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 (# F₄ h)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
       (linvunitor (id₁ x))) = ?t20

          exact (!(pr1_idtoiso_concat _ _)).

  bicat_of_univ_cats

(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?t2

                 pr1 (# F₄ h)

                         (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
                (linvunitor (id₁ x)))))) = ?t2

     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· (pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
   · pr1

                ((pr111 n₃) x

                x) @
