             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths

           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?y'

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b = ?y'

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
((linvunitor (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F₄ x ▹ # F₄ (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx)))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))

            exact (!(id_left _)).
          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
?y'

          apply (psfunctor_idtoiso F₄).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# F₄ h)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
     (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?t2

        exact (!(pr1_idtoiso_concat _ _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
                ((pr111 n₃) x
                   ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
                ((pr111 n₃) x
                   ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
                ((pr111 n₃) x
                   ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) = ?b

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,

              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)

              ((pr111 n₃) x

              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),

     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

· (pr1

            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)

            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)

   · idtoiso

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

?b =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))

          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧

xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
              ((pr111 n₃) x
                 ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
?b

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F₄ h)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
           ((pr111 n₃) x
              ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F₄ h)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
?t2

        exact (!(pr1_idtoiso_concat _ _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
              ((pr111 n₃) x
                 ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
          (# (n₃ x)
             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
              ((pr111 n₃) x
                 ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category

  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (transportf
     (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
      # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
     (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
     (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
      · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))

             ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
                (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
           · pr1
               (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
               ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
      · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
          (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
              ((pr111 n₃) x
                 ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b = ?t20

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
((linvunitor (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F₄ x ▹ # F₄ (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
?b

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
     (pr1 (n₃ x) ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· # (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))

            exact (!(id_left _)).
          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
## F₄ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
?t20

          apply (psfunctor_idtoiso F₄).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (# (n₃ x)
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
             (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
        · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
            ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 (# F₄ h)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
       (linvunitor (id₁ x))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (# (n₃ x)
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
             (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
        · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
            ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 (# F₄ h)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
       (linvunitor (id₁ x))) = ?b

  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (# (n₃ x)
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
             (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
        · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
            ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 (# F₄ h)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
       (linvunitor (id₁ x))) = ?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
   · # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (# (n₃ x)
          ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
             (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
        · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
            ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) = 
?y'

          apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄)).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
    (# (n₃ x)
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
     · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
         ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
          (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 (# F₄ h)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
       (linvunitor (id₁ x))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
    (# (n₃ x)
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
     · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
         ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
           (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
    (# (n₃ x)
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
     · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
         ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
           (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?b

                (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))

?y'0 =
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x) (n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· # (# F₄ (id₁ x))
    (# (n₃ x)
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
     · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
         ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))

            apply (nat_trans_ax (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))).

# (id₁ (F₄ x))
  (# (n₃ x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
        (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
       ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (# F₄ (id₁ x)
       (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) = ?y'

n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) = ?b

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
((rinvunitor (# F₄ (id₁ x))
  • (# F₄ (id₁ x) ◃ psfunctor_id F₄ x))
 • psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) = ?b

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) = ?b

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))

            
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₄ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))): ## F₄ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· psfunctor_comp F₄ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))) =
id₁
  (# F₄ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (pr1 (# F₄ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))

            exact (!(id_left _)).
          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
## F₄ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
?t20

          apply (psfunctor_idtoiso F₄).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₄ x))
  (# (n₃ x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
        (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
       ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        pr1 (# F₄ h)
          (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
       (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₄ x))
  (# (n₃ x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
        (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
       ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F₄ h)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
        (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
                (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₄ x))
  (# (n₃ x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
        (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
       ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F₄ h)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
        (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
                (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₄ x))
  (# (n₃ x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
        (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
       ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F₄ h)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
        (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
                (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) = ?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# F₄ h)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
     (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?t20

          exact (!(pr1_idtoiso_concat _ _)).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₄ x))
  (# (n₃ x)
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
        (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
       ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (n₃ x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
    ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₄ h
             (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (n₃ x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
    ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)) = ?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt n₃ x)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)): ((psfunctor_id F₃ x ▹ n₃ x)
 • (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x)) ^-1)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)) =
((lunitor (n₃ x) • rinvunitor (n₃ x))
 • (n₃ x ◃ psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))
# (n₃ x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
    ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)) = ?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt n₃ x)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)): # (pr1 (n₃ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x)) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (n₃ x
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· id₁
    (n₃ x
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (pr1 (n₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
# (n₃ x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (n₂ x) (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x))) ^-1
    ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx)) = ?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt n₃ x)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)): # (pr1 (n₃ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x)) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (n₃ x
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· id₁
    (n₃ x
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (pr1 (n₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
id₁
  (n₃ x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· id₁
    (n₃ x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (pr1 (n₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt n₃ x)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)): # (pr1 (n₃ x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· (psnaturality_of n₃ (id₁ x)) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (n₃ x
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· id₁
    (n₃ x
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
    (pr1 (n₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
  (pr1 (n₃ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))) =
?y'

        apply idpath.
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     (pr1 (n₃ x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              # F₄ h
                (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
              ((pr111 n₃) x
                 ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     (pr1 (n₃ x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              # F₄ h
                (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
              ((pr111 n₃) x
                 ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₄ x ⟦ n₃ x (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)),
   # F₄ z
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
     (pr1 (n₃ x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              # F₄ h
                (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₄ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x))))) = ?b

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
  (pr1 (n₃ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₄ h
             (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₄ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
              ((pr111 n₃) x
                 ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
  (pr1 (n₃ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            # F₄ h
              (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
              ((pr111 n₃) x
                 ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
