xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₄ x)
  (pr1 (n₃ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx)))
· (pr1
     (idtoiso
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            # F₄ h
              (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₄ x))
  (pr1 (n₃ x) (n₂ x (n₁ x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       ((maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
              ((pr111 n₃) x
                 ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
           (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
              x) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
            pr1 (# F₄ h)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                    (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
           (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
             ((pr111 n₃) x
                ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1
  (idtoiso
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F₄ h)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
        (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         # F₄ h
           (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
        (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
         pr1 (# F₄ h)
           (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
              (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x)
                 (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
        (linvunitor (id₁ x))))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
          ((pr111 n₃) x
             ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
?t2

        exact (!(pr1_idtoiso_concat _ _)).

n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b = ?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₄ h)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   # F₄ h (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₄ h)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) = ?b

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) = ?t2

          exact (!(maponpathscomp0 (λ h, pr1 (#(F₄ : psfunctor _ _) h) _) _ _)).

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1
     (# (F₄
         :
         psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op)
           bicat_of_univ_cats) h)
     (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x @
   linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
(maponpaths
   (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 (# F₄ h)
      (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
         (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
   (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
 maponpaths
   (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
      ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
   (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) @
 maponpaths
   (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
    pr1 (# F₄ h)
      (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
         (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
   (linvunitor (id₁ x))) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₄ h)
     (pr1 ((pr111 n₃) x)
        (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₁) x) xx))))
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1
     (# (F₄
         :
         psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op)
           bicat_of_univ_cats) h)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x @
   linvunitor (id₁ x)) = ?y'

        exact (!(maponpathscomp0 (λ h, pr1 (#(F₄ : psfunctor _ _) h) _) _ _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
n₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₃, F₄ ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1
     (# (F₄
         :
         psfunctor (cat_to_bicat C^op)
           bicat_of_univ_cats) h)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x (n₁ x xx))))
  (linvunitor (id₁ x) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x @
   linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₄ $ h)
     ((pr111 n₃) x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₄ h)
     (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))
  ((rinvunitor (id₁ x) @
    disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x @
    linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₄ h)
     (n₃ x ((pr111 n₂) x ((pr111 n₁) x xx))))

    disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x @

   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
maponpaths

  ((rinvunitor (id₁ x) @

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃, F₄: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(linvunitor (id₁ x) @
 disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x @
 linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x =
(rinvunitor (id₁ x) @
 disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x @
 linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x

      apply homset_property.

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n m₁
• PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
    psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (n ◃ w) =
(# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n
 ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w)
• PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
    psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n m₂

F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
∏ (x : C)
(xx : pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x),
(PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
   psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n m₁
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (n ◃ w)) x
  xx =
((# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n
  ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
      psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w)
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n m₂) x xx

F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
   psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n m₁
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (n ◃ w)) x
  xx =
((# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n
  ◃ PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
      psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w)
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₁ x) (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
            ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₁ x) (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
            ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category

  bicat_of_univ_cats

w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₁ x) (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
            ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₁ x) (n x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
         ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?t2

w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₁ x) (n x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
         ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?b

  bicat_of_univ_cats

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b = ?t2

F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₁ x) (n x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
         ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₁ x) (n x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
         ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) = ?y'

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?y' =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₁ x) (n x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
         ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

          apply (nat_trans_ax (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
     (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)): ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)) =
((rinvunitor (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  • (# F₃ (id₁ x) ◃ psfunctor_id F₃ x))
 • psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)): ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)): ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)): ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))

        exact (!(id_left _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (id₁ (F₃ x))
     (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
          ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
   · ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (id₁ (F₃ x))
     (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
          ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
   · ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (id₁ (F₃ x))
     (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
          ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
   · ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))) =
?b

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· (## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
?b

  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),

  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))

       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)

       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· (## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· idtoiso

## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)) = ?y'

          apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# F₃ h)
        (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
     (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?t2 =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# F₃ h)
        (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
     (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))

        apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
w x (n x xx) · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
w x (n x xx) · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
· (# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)) =
((linvunitor (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F₃ x ▹ # F₃ (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m₂ x) (n x xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))

        exact (!(id_left _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))) =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m₁ x (n x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (w x (n x xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
   · ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))) =
?b

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
w x (n x xx) · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
· ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
    (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m₂) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)))

        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

        apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.

xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
w x (n x xx) · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x) (m₂ x (n x xx))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,

pr1 ((pr111 w) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx))
· pr1
    (idtoiso

maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h)

  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   # F₃ h ((pr111 m₂) x ((pr111 n) x xx)))

  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,

  (linvunitor (id₁ x) @

  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m₁, m₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: m₁ ==> m₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
linvunitor (id₁ x) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x =
rinvunitor (id₁ x) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x

      apply homset_property.

psfunctor_rwhisker_law
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
 
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧

(PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp

x: C

   psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₁ m
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells

  xx =
((PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_on_cells
    psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data w
  ▹ # psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data m)
 • PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₁ x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
            ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₁ x xx))
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
        · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
            ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)

            ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))

(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
         ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
         ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))) = ?y'

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?y' =
(pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₁ x xx))
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
     · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
         ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

          apply (nat_trans_ax (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))).
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) = ?t2

m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
     (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))) = ?t2

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)): ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) =
((rinvunitor (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  • (# F₃ (id₁ x) ◃ psfunctor_id F₃ x))
 • psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)): ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) = ?t2

p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)): ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_rinvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)): ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (# F₃ (id₁ x) ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))

        exact (!(id_left _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (id₁ (F₃ x))
     (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
   · ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)

xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (id₁ (F₃ x))
     (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
   · ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (id₁ (F₃ x))
     (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
      · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
   · ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))) =
?b

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· ## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· (## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

?b =

  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,

  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))

       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· (## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· idtoiso

        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)

w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
?b

          
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
## F₃ (rinvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) = ?y'

          apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# F₃ h)
        (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
     (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?t2 =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# F₃ h)
        (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
     (rinvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))

        apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))) =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))) = ?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
       ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x))
          (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))) = ?b

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· # (# F₃ (id₁ x))
    ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· (# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
     ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
   · pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) =
((linvunitor (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  • (psfunctor_id F₃ x ▹ # F₃ (id₁ x)))
 • psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) = ?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx)))
· pr1 (psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x))
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (psfunctor_linvunitor F₃ (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)): ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· psfunctor_comp F₃ (id₁ x) (id₁ x)
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
# (# F₃ (id₁ x))
  ((pr11 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)) (pr1 (m x) (n₂ x xx))) =
id₁
  (# F₃ (id₁ x)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
· # (pr1 (# F₃ (id₁ x)))
    (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))

        exact (!(id_left _)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))) =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category

  bicat_of_univ_cats
