w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
transportf
  (λ z : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   F₃ x ⟦ m x (n₁ x xx),
   # F₃ z ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)) ⟧)
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)
  (# (m x)
     (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
       (n₂ x xx)
   · ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
       (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))) =
?b

        apply (transportf_indexed_cat_to_disp_cat (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃)).
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· ## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
    (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· (## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· (## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
   · idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
?b

w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))

        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
## F₃ (linvunitor (id₁ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) = ?y'

          apply psfunctor_idtoiso.
        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# F₃ h)
        (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
     (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)) =
?t2

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?t2 =
idtoiso
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
      pr1 (# F₃ h)
        (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
     (linvunitor (id₁ x)))
· idtoiso
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
        (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
          ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
       (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))

        apply pr1_idtoiso_concat.

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
# (id₁ (F₃ x))
  (# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
   · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
       ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ^opp ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F₃ $ h)
             ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx · pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· pr1

       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)

        apply functor_comp.
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx)
· # (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx)
· # (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₃ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x)))) =
# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
· (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
     ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₃ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
             (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x))))

      
C: univalent_category

  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (w x xx)
· (# (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
   · (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1
        (n₂ x xx)
      · pr1
          (idtoiso
             (maponpaths
                (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                 pr1 (# F₃ h)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                      (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
                (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
              maponpaths
                (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
                 # F₃ h
                   ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
                (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                   x))))) =
# (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)) (pr1 ((pr111 w) x) xx)
· (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
     ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₃ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
             (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x))))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· (pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
   · pr1
       (idtoiso
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              pr1 (# F₃ h)
                (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                   (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
             (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
              # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
             (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof
                x)))) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

# (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)

                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats

  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
?b
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
?b =
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx)
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))

          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,

C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
# (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx) =
?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt m x)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx): ((psfunctor_id F₂ x ▹ m x)
 • (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x)) ^-1)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx) =
((lunitor (m x) • rinvunitor (m x))
 • (m x ◃ psfunctor_id F₃ x))
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)
# (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx) =
?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt m x)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx): # (pr1 (m x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x)) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx) =
id₁ (m x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· id₁ (m x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (m x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
# (m x) (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (n₂ x xx))
· pr1 (pr2 (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x))) ^-1 (n₂ x xx) =
?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt m x)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx): # (pr1 (m x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x)) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx) =
id₁ (m x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· id₁ (m x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (m x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
id₁ (m x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· id₁ (m x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (m x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) = ?y'

        
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise (pstrans_id_inv_alt m x)
  (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx): # (pr1 (m x))
  (pr1 (psfunctor_id F₂ x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· (psnaturality_of m (id₁ x)) ^-1
    (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx) =
id₁ (m x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· id₁ (m x (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
    (pr1 (m x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (pr1 (m x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)) = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  (pr1 (m x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x))) =
pr1 (psfunctor_id F₃ x)
  ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx))
· pr1
    (idtoiso
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           pr1 (# F₃ h)
             (pr1 ((pr111 m) x)
                (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
          (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
           # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
          (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)))

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
  (linvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h) (m x (n₂ x xx)))
  (linvunitor (id₁ x) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h)
     (pr1 ((pr111 m) x) (pr1 ((pr111 n₂) x) xx)))
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : C ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   # F₃ h ((pr111 m) x ((pr111 n₂) x xx)))
  (disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h) (m x (n₂ x xx)))
  (linvunitor (id₁ x) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x) =
maponpaths
  (λ h : cat_to_bicat C^op ⟦ x, x ⟧,
   pr1 (# F₃ h) (m x (n₂ x xx)))
  (rinvunitor (id₁ x) @
   disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x)

      
C: univalent_category
F₁, F₂, F₃: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁, n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₁, F₂ ⟧
m: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F₂, F₃ ⟧
w: n₁ ==> n₂
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F₁) x
linvunitor (id₁ x) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x =
rinvunitor (id₁ x) @
disp_nat_trans_over_id_comp_data_subproof x

      apply homset_property.
  Qed.

  
C: univalent_category
invertible_cells psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data

  
C: univalent_category
invertible_cells psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data

    
C: univalent_category
∏
a : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
      bicat_of_univ_cats,
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data a)
C: univalent_category
∏
(a b
 c : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧),
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data f g)

    
C: univalent_category
∏
a : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
      bicat_of_univ_cats,
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data a)
 
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C)) x)
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F x xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
indexed_cat_to_disp_cat_z_iso_weq_base
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
  (pr1 (id₁ (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F))
     x xx)
  (pr1
     (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (id₁ F))
     x xx) ?f =
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F x xx
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F (functor_identity C x)
⟦ pr1 (id₁ (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F))
    x xx,
pr1 (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (id₁ F))
  x xx ⟧
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
is_z_isomorphism ?f

      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
indexed_cat_to_disp_cat_z_iso_weq_base
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat F)
  (pr1 (id₁ (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F))
     x xx)
  (pr1
     (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (id₁ F))
     x xx) ?f =
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_id
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F x xx
 apply id_left.
      
C: univalent_category
F: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
is_z_isomorphism
  (id₁
     (pr1
        (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
           (id₁ F)) x xx))
 apply is_z_isomorphism_identity.
    
C: univalent_category
∏
(a b
 c : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats)
(f : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
       bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ b, c ⟧),
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data f g)
 
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ G, H ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₁ n₂)

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ G, H ⟧
is_disp_nat_z_iso (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C))
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₁ n₂)

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
is_z_iso_disp
  (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso
     (nat_z_iso_id (functor_identity C)) x)
  (PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
     psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₁ n₂ x xx)

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
indexed_cat_to_disp_cat_z_iso_weq_base
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H)
  (pr1
     (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₁
      · # psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₂) x
     xx)
  (pr1
     (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
        (n₁ · n₂)) x xx) ?f =
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₁ n₂ x xx
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H (functor_identity C x)
⟦ pr1
    (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₁
     · # psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₂) x
    xx,
pr1
  (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data (n₁ · n₂))
  x xx ⟧
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
is_z_isomorphism ?f

      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
indexed_cat_to_disp_cat_z_iso_weq_base
  (psfunctor_to_indexed_cat H)
  (pr1
     (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₁
      · # psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₂) x
     xx)
  (pr1
     (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
        (n₁ · n₂)) x xx) ?f =
PseudoFunctorBicat.psfunctor_comp
  psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data n₁ n₂ x xx
 apply id_left.
      
C: univalent_category
F, G, H: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats
n₁: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ F, G ⟧
n₂: psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
  bicat_of_univ_cats ⟦ G, H ⟧
x: C
xx: pr1 (psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data F) x
is_z_isomorphism
  (id₁
     (pr1
        (# psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
           (n₁ · n₂)) x xx))
 apply is_z_isomorphism_identity.
  Qed.

  (**
   8. The pseudofunctor from pseudofunctors to fibrations
   *)
  
C: univalent_category
psfunctor
  (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
     bicat_of_univ_cats) (fib_slice_bicat C)

  
C: univalent_category
psfunctor
  (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
     bicat_of_univ_cats) (fib_slice_bicat C)

    
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_data
  (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
     bicat_of_univ_cats) (fib_slice_bicat C)
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_laws ?F
C: univalent_category
invertible_cells ?F

    
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_data
  (psfunctor_bicat (cat_to_bicat C^op)
     bicat_of_univ_cats) (fib_slice_bicat C)
 exact psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data.
    
C: univalent_category
psfunctor_laws psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
 exact psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_laws.
    
C: univalent_category
invertible_cells psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_data
 exact psfunctor_psfunctor_bicat_to_fib_invertible_cells.
  Defined.
End GrothendieckConstruction.
